title_of_original: State Aid SA.38330 (2016/FC) - Poland Alleged unlawful regional investment aid to PCC MCAA sp. Zo.o (PCC)
case_description: [1] On the 1st of March 2016 the Portuguese Ministry of Economy released permit NO 134. [2] This permit entitled XCA Lda (hereinafter XCA) to conduct business activities in the “FUTURE-PARK” Alentejo Special Economic Zone and [3] invoked an exemption from corporate income tax for income from the investment. [4] The permit specified the maximum amount of eligible investment costs as 69 999 999 €. [5] The maximum amount of the tax exemption was not stated in the permit. [6] The Portuguese authorities later published a calculation, [7] stating that the maximum value of the corporate income tax exemption amounts to EUR 7543234 €.
